name: ML Trading Dev Container
postCreateCommand:
sudo -H pip3 install -e . && if [ -d /home/yin/.ssh-host ] && [ ! -d /home/yin/.ssh ]; then cp -r /home/yin/.ssh-host /home/yin/.ssh && chmod 700 /home/yin/.ssh && chmod 600 /home/yin/.ssh/* 2>/dev/null || true; fi && mkdir -p /home/yin/.ssh && echo -e 'Host *
    ForwardAgent yes
    IdentityAgent $SSH_AUTH_SOCK
    StrictHostKeyChecking no' > /home/yin/.ssh/config && chmod 600 /home/yin/.ssh/config
